title: Ravenhead Essentials Pepper Pot
features: STYLISH GLASSWARE | The Essentials pepper pot make a functional, durable addition to any household. A great way of storing and serving ground pepper and small enough to be stored away without fuss. This pepper pot even features an embossed 'P' design, leaving no room for confusion with salt!
TAKING CARE | This Pepper Pot are dishwasher safe. Please wash before first use.
ESSENTIAL | The Ravenhead Essentials range is a comprehensive collection of high-quality, dishwasher-safe, resilient glassware perfect for everyday use.

THE RAVENHEAD STORY | Ravenhead dates back to a factory based at St Helens in North West England in 1842, an area renowned for its glassmaking. Primarily producing bottles, Ravenhead in the 1930s branched out into domestic tableware such as bowls, jugs and drinking glasses.
description: From the manufacturer Great British Business Today’s Ravenhead, thanks to its foundations, has built an enviable international reputation for high quality glassware that combines strength and durability. Perfect for Everyday Use The Ravenhead Essentials collection is a comprehensive range of high quality, dishwasher safe, resilient glassware, perfect for everyday use. Known for Quality Made from durable, and highly translucent glass which can be used time and time again in the dishwasher.
